# EKO SOLAR PROS

> Atlanta's Solar Troubleshooting & Repair Specialist

## About

EKO SOLAR PROS is Atlanta, Georgia's trusted solar repair company, founded in 2015. We specialize in fixing solar systems installed by any company — not just our own. We've repaired over 1,500 solar systems across Georgia.

## Services

- System Diagnostics ($400): Complete inspection of inverters, panels, wiring, and monitoring systems with written diagnosis report
- Inverter Repair & Replacement ($499+): Same-day repairs for SolarEdge, Enphase, SMA, Fronius, Tesla, and all major brands
- Panel Replacement & Repair ($499+): Individual or full array replacement matching specifications
- Monitoring & Electrical Fixes ($499+): App connections, wiring, grounding, and disconnect repairs
- RMA Warranty Claims (included): We handle all manufacturer warranty paperwork at no additional cost

## Pricing

- Diagnostic Service: $400 (site visit + full system diagnostic)
- Standard Repair: Starting at $499 (includes diagnostic, 90-day warranty)
- Major System Restore: Starting at $1,299 (full rework, 1-year warranty)

## Service Area

Atlanta, Sandy Springs, Buckhead, Marietta, Decatur, Alpharetta, Midtown, and all of Georgia.

## Brands We Repair

SolarEdge, Enphase, SMA, Fronius, Tesla, SunPower, LG, Panasonic, Canadian Solar, Q Cells, and more.

## Contact

Website: https://troubleshoot.ekosolarpros.com
Location: Atlanta, GA
